EventHandler.Name: PLCallPromptPrintRMACreditMemo
EventHandler.Response: ACTION(GenEventRet:"ThisForm", #V(PLPREVIEW) = PREVIEW, PLPromptPreviewRMACreditMemo, GenEventRet:"ThisForm", #V(PLPREVIEW) <> PREVIEW, PLPromptPrintRMACreditMemo)

EventHandler.Name: PLClearRMA
EventHandler.Response: SETCOMPVALUES(StartRMALineEdit=, StartRMAEdit=, StartCustomerEdit=, StartLastReturnDateEdit=, EndRMAEdit=, EndRMALineEdit=, EndCustomerEdit=, EndLastReturnDateEdit=)

EventHandler.Name: PLCreateVariables
EventHandler.Response: SP!.DefineVariableSp( PARMS(VAR PLPrintTariffCode, VAR V(PLPrintTariffCode), MESSAGE) )

EventHandler.Name: PLCreateVariables
EventHandler.Response: SP!.DefineVariableSp( PARMS(VAR PLPPrintRule, VAR V(PLPrintLabelDef), MESSAGE) )

EventHandler.Name: PLCreateVariables
EventHandler.Response: SP!.DefineVariableSp( PARMS(VAR PCity, VAR V(PLCity), MESSAGE) )

EventHandler.Name: PLCreateVariables
EventHandler.Response: DefineVariables.DefineVariableSp( PARMS(VAR PLFinalPrintOut, VAR V(FinalPrintoutVar), MESSAGE) )

EventHandler.Name: PLEnsureQRCodePrintOut
EventHandler.Response: SLPLKSeFDocuments.EnsureQRs( PARMS(VAR V(StartCreditMemo), VAR 0, MESSAGE) ERRORMESSAGE(mBackEndMessage) SUCCESSMESSAGE(mBackEndMessage) )

EventHandler.Name: PLPrint
EventHandler.Response: ACTION(GenEventRet:"ThisForm", #V(PLPREVIEW) <> PREVIEW, SubmitReportInvoice, GenEventRet:"ThisForm", #V(PLPREVIEW) = PREVIEW, PLSubmitPreview)

EventHandler.Name: PLSetPrintWord
EventHandler.Response: SP!.DefineVariableSp( PARMS(VAR PLPrintWord, VAR V(PLPrintWord), MESSAGE) )

EventHandler.Name: PreProcess
EventHandler.Response: SLPeriods.DateChkSp( PARMS(VAR C(CreditMemoDateEdit), BSTR C(CreditMemoDateStatic), BSTR @%update, MESSAGE, RVAR V(DateChkPromptMsg), RVAR V(DateChkPromptButtons)) ERRORMESSAGE(mBackEndMessage) )

EventHandler.Name: PreProcess
EventHandler.Response: SL.SLInvHdrs.RMA10RPreCheckSp( PARMS(BSTR V(StartRMA), BSTR V(EndRMA), BSTR V(StartRMALine), BSTR V(EndRMALine), BSTR V(StartCustomer), BSTR V(EndCustomer), BSTR V(StartLastReturnDate), BSTR V(EndLastReturnDate), RVAR V(PromptMsg), RVAR V(PromptButtons)) )

EventHandler.Name: PreProcess
EventHandler.Response: ACTION(GenEventRet:"ThisForm", #GV(IsCSIB_79704ActiveVar) = "1" & #GV(Avail_PL) = "1" & #V(PLPREVIEW) <> PREVIEW, PLPreProcessAsk, GenEventRet:"ThisForm", #GV(IsCSIB_79704ActiveVar) = "1" & #GV(Avail_PL) = "1" & #V(PLPREVIEW) = PREVIEW, PLPrePreviewAsk)

EventHandler.Name: StdFormPredisplay
EventHandler.Response: SL.SLInvSequences.CheckInvLengthSp( PARMS(RVAR V(PreDisplayResult), MESSAGE) ERRORMESSAGE(mBackEndMessage) IGNOREFAILURE() )

EventHandler.Name: StdFormPredisplay
EventHandler.Response: SL.SLArparms.GetArparmLinesPerDocSp( PARMS(RVAR V(UsePrePrintedForms), RVAR V(LinesPerInv), RVAR V(LinesPerDM), RVAR V(LinesPerCM)) )

EventHandler.Name: StdFormPredisplay
EventHandler.Response: SLFormAdoption.LoadBannerStatus( PARMS(VAR V(CurrentFormName), RVAR V(DisableBanner), RVAR V(EndOfSupport), RVAR V(NewFormName), RVAR V(ToastStatus)) )

Variable.Name: BGTaskParms
Variable.Value: V(SessionID), V(ProcessReprint), V(PrintItemCustItem), V(IncludeSerialNumbers), V(TranslateToDomesticCurrency), V(StartCreditMemo), V(EndCreditMemo), V(StartCreditMemoDate), V(EndCreditMemoDate), V(PrintOrderNotes), V(PrintRMANotes), V(PrintShipToNotes), V(PrintBillToNotes), V(PrintInternalNotes), V(PrintExternalNotes), V(PrintItemOverview), V(PrintRMALineNotes),V(PrintLotNumbers),V(Parm_UseAlternateAddressReportFormat)

Variable.Name: BGTaskParmsInvoice
Variable.Value: V(SessionID),R,V(BGTaskName),V(FormType),,V(CreditMemoDate),V(StartCustomer),V(EndCustomer),V(StartRMA),V(EndRMA),V(StartRMALine),V(EndRMALine),,,V(StartLastReturnDate),V(EndLastReturnDate),,,,V(PrintInJPInvoiceFormat),,,,V(StartCreditMemo),V(EndCreditMemo),V(PrintItemCustItem), V(TranslateToDomesticCurrency), V(IncludeSerialNumbers),,,,, V(PrintOrderNotes), V(PrintRMALineNotes), V(PrintRMANotes),, V(PrintInternalNotes), V(PrintExternalNotes), V(PrintItemOverview),,, V(PrintShipToNotes), V(Print

Variable.Name: ehm1_Process1
Variable.Value: PARMS(VAR V(FormType), VAR V(CreditMemoDate), VAR V(TranslateToDomesticCurrency), VAR V(StartRMA), VAR V(EndRMA), VAR V(StartRMALine), VAR V(EndRMALine), VAR V(StartCustomer), VAR V(EndCustomer), VAR V(StartLastReturnDate), VAR V(EndLastReturnDate), RVAR V(StartCreditMemo), RVAR V(EndCreditMemo), RVAR V(StartCreditMemoDate), RVAR V(EndCreditMemoDate), VAR V(PrintOrderNotes), VAR V(PrintRMANotes), VAR V(PrintShipToNotes), VAR V(PrintBillToNotes), VAR V(PrintInternalNotes), VAR V(PrintExternalNote
Variable.Value2: s), VAR V(PrintRMALineNotes), MESSAGE, RVAR V(SessionID))

Variable.Name: fds1_PrimaryMethodParms
Variable.Value: PARMS(VAR V(StartCreditMemo), VAR V(EndCreditMemo), VAR V(StartCreditMemoDate), VAR V(EndCreditMemoDate))

Variable.Name: fds1_SecCol2MethodParms
Variable.Value: PARMS(VAR V(StartCreditMemo), VAR V(EndCreditMemo), VAR V(StartCreditMemoDate), VAR V(EndCreditMemoDate))

ScriptLines.ScriptLine: ' If no credit memos were processed, a different message is displayed.
' If none are processed, a different message will be displayed.
If ThisForm.PrimaryIDOCollection.GetObjectProperty("DerLangCode", linIndex) <> ThisForm.PrimaryIDOCollection.GetObjectProperty("DerLangCode", linStart) Then Exit For

Dim ir As InvokeRequestData = New InvokeRequestData()
Dim taski() As String = response.Parameters(2).Value.Split(New String() {"|"}, StringSplitOptions.RemoveEmptyEntries)
For Each task As String In taski

For Each task As String In taski
